changeSet.author: afra7kom
changeSet.comment: Fix column types in reservations table that were incorrectly created as bytea
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE reservations ALTER COLUMN first_name TYPE VARCHAR(100) USING first_name::text;
ALTER TABLE reservations ALTER COLUMN last_name TYPE VARCHAR(100) USING last_name::text;
ALTER TABLE reservations ALTER COLUMN phone TYPE VARCHAR(20) USING phone::text;
ALTER TABLE reservations ALTER COLUMN email TYPE VARCHAR(255) USING email::text;
